title: alnus × koehnei
intro: Alnus × koehnei, also known as the hybrid alder, is a rare and unique plant species resulting from the cross between the white alder (Alnus incana) and the green alder (Alnus glutinosa). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Asian medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Alnus × koehnei include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress and improve overall well-being. Alnus × koehnei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal preparation methods.
